name: dep-health-test-cascade
description:
Fixture: engineered to trigger cascade group detection.

react-dom@18 declares peerDependencies: { react: '^18' }, so react + react-dom
must be upgraded together — the scorer will assign them the same cascade group.
@testing-library/react@14 similarly requires react@^18, pulling it into the same group.
react-router-dom@6 requires react@>=16.8 so it may or may not join depending on
whether the constraint is satisfiable at the pinned version.
